name: hyperspace-html-review
description: Review agent-authored HTML artifacts with nearby comments, targeted edits, and local saves.

scripts.check: node --check hyperspace.js && node --check server.js && node --check scripts/smoke-distribution.js && node --check scripts/smoke-hyperclay-local-core.js && node --check scripts/dogfood-skill-review-loop.js && node --check scripts/verify-agent-config-boundary.js && node --check scripts/verify-release.js && bun scripts/verify-agent-config-boundary.js && bun run typecheck
